primer:
## What kanji are
**Kanji** are characters borrowed from Chinese that carry **meaning**, not just sound. A single kanji like 日 means 'day / sun' — unlike kana, which only spell sounds. This starter set is the **JLPT N5** level: about 90 of the most basic, highest-frequency kanji.

## On'yomi vs kun'yomi
Most kanji have **at least two readings**:
- **on'yomi** — the Chinese-derived reading, used mostly in compound words (e.g. 学 *gaku* in 学校 *gakkō* 'school').
- **kun'yomi** — the native Japanese reading, used when the kanji stands alone (e.g. 学ぶ *manabu* 'to learn').

Cards here list a **simplified main reading** — usually the most common on'yomi, plus the kun'yomi where it matters. Real words may use other readings; the goal at N5 is recognising the **meaning** plus one anchor reading.

## How this set works
Each card is studied **both ways** and tracked separately — character → meaning and meaning → character. You master a card only once you know it in both directions. Pin a direction in ⚙ settings to drill one way.

## Meaning chart (every answer is here)
- **Numbers:** 一 1 · 二 2 · 三 3 · 四 4 · 五 5 · 六 6 · 七 7 · 八 8 · 九 9 · 十 10 · 百 100 · 千 1,000 · 万 10,000 · 円 yen/circle
- **Time & days:** 日 day/sun · 月 month/moon · 火 fire (Tue) · 水 water (Wed) · 木 tree (Thu) · 金 gold/money (Fri) · 土 earth (Sat) · 年 year · 時 hour · 間 interval · 分 minute · 今 now · 半 half · 毎 every · 週 week
- **Nature:** 山 mountain · 川 river · 田 rice field · 天 sky · 気 spirit/air · 雨 rain · 電 electricity · 花 flower · 魚 fish
- **Size & position:** 大 big · 小 small · 中 middle · 上 up · 下 down · 左 left · 右 right · 前 front · 後 after · 外 outside
- **People & family:** 人 person · 男 man · 女 woman · 子 child · 父 father · 母 mother · 友 friend · 名 name
- **Body:** 口 mouth · 目 eye · 耳 ear · 手 hand · 足 foot · 力 power · 体 body
- **Verbs:** 行 go · 来 come · 見 see · 聞 hear · 言 say · 食 eat · 飲 drink · 読 read · 書 write · 話 speak · 出 exit · 入 enter · 買 buy · 立 stand
- **School & language:** 学 study · 校 school · 先 ahead · 生 life · 国 country · 語 language · 本 book · 字 character · 文 writing
- **Places & directions:** 東 east · 西 west · 南 south · 北 north · 店 shop · 駅 station · 道 road · 車 car
- **Adjectives & misc:** 高 high · 安 cheap · 新 new · 古 old · 長 long · 白 white · 多 many · 少 few · 好 like

If you know this chart both ways, you'll pass the deck.
